name: WWPKG Holdings Company Limited
summary: WWPKG Holdings Company Limited operates as a travel agent in Hong Kong and Macau. It designs, develops, and sells package tours; and sells air tickets and hotel accommodations, as well as ancillary travel related products and services under the WWPKG brand, as well as invests in tourism and travel technology related businesses. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong. WWPKG Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of WWPKG Investment Holdings Limited.
